calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Nov-01-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Derek Lim (Counsel for the Petitioner, Lisa Feng Lei); Lisa Feng Lei (Petitioner); Mr. Sang (Interpreter).

The Court noted that the matter appeared to be procedurally in order, found that the Petitioner's date of birth was August 10, 1945, and granted the Petition, signing the Order for same in open court.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Continued To Nov-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
